params.negative_prompt: no text, no words, no letters, no numbers, no digits, no labels, no stickers, no decals, no placards, no serial tags, no serial plates, no engraved plates, no warning signs, no warning plates, no stamped markings, no screen digits, no icon plates, no symbol plates, no interface readouts, no readable ui
params.note_text: Final beat 03 deliverable. Preserve the threshold line as the single surreal conversion of decision logic into form.

params.safe_zone_intent: preserve a quiet upper band and keep the decision threshold above the subtitle zone
params.signal_anchor: control-room threshold cutting through a calm console field
params.historical_anchor: NASA and Thiokol decision space inside the launch-commit control environment
params.surreal_breach: a single division line slices through the room as if the burden of proof became architecture
